context: Backend service for trellis: Supabase vs Firebase
selection_rationale: Supabase chosen for row-level security (RLS) which gives per-user data isolation at the database level. Firebase lacks native RLS — would require custom Cloud Functions for equivalent security.

hypotheses.rationale: Row-level security, full SQL, open source, self-hostable
More mature Flutter SDK, simpler NoSQL model, wider community

context: State management pattern for trellis Flutter app
selection_rationale: BLoC pattern chosen for clear separation of business logic from UI, strong testability, and established Flutter ecosystem support. Consistent with team experience.

hypotheses.rationale: Industry standard, excellent testability, clear separation of concerns
Modern, compile-safe, but less team familiarity
Simple but less structured for complex state

selection_rationale: Deferred offline sync to v0.3. Conflict resolution is too complex for MVP scope. Supabase Realtime provides sufficient real-time updates when online.

hypotheses.description: Defer to v0.3, use Supabase Realtime for MVP
hypotheses.rationale: Conflict resolution complexity is too high for MVP timeline
